title: PolarPilot AssistantTaskDone
description: Payload contract for PolarPilot → PolarClaw assistant-task completion notification (delivered as LobsterEvent.payload with event.type = 'assistant_task_done').

task_id.description: Stable identifier echoed back to the caller (defaults to 'assist-<epoch_ms>').

status.description: Terminal status of the assistant run.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of the final iteration.

artifacts.description: Repository-relative paths (or symbolic identifiers) of artifacts produced.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the orchestrator started.

finished_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the done event was emitted.
